name: OpenVAS / Greenbone
description: OpenVAS / Greenbone Vulnerability Management (GVM). Offline mode parses a GMP XML report export (<report><results><result>…): each scanned host becomes an ASSET and each result becomes a VULNERABILITY (CVE refs, else NVT:<oid>; severity from the threat/CVSS). Live mode drives gvmd over GMP (python-gvm) — creates a target, runs a 'Full and fast' scan task, waits for completion, fetches the report and imports it; connection + credentials via worker env GVM_HOST/GVM_PORT (or GVM_SOCKET) + GVM_USER/GVM_PASSWORD. Active network vulnerability scanning (intrusive) in live mode. No DB access in run.py (worker-safe).

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Path on the worker to a Greenbone GMP XML report to import (offline mode).

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Live mode: host or IP/CIDR for gvmd to scan (must be in the engagement scope).
